name: sn2-chloride_transition_state
prompt: Run the transition-state task on the sn2-chloride TS guess geometry using the PM7 (mopac) method in the gas phase with charge -1. Report the total energy in eV as the headline value, and state whether the converged structure is a valid TS (exactly one imaginary mode) and the imaginary frequency. State the method and charge used. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number.
